assertions.assertion: Creates a ClaimsPrincipal with a ClaimsIdentity containing a birthdate claim
assertions.rationale: Standard ASP.NET Core authorization testing knowledge

assertions.assertion: Constructs an AuthorizationHandlerContext with the requirement, user principal, and resource
assertions.rationale: AuthorizationHandlerContext is documented in Microsoft docs for testing handlers

assertions.assertion: Calls HandleAsync on the handler directly
assertions.rationale: Standard pattern for unit testing authorization handlers

assertions.assertion: Asserts context.HasSucceeded is true for a user meeting the age requirement
assertions.rationale: Standard assertion pattern for authorization handler tests

assertions.assertion: Asserts context.HasSucceeded is false for a user not meeting the age requirement
assertions.rationale: Standard assertion pattern for authorization handler tests
